tweets.full_text: Most vessels using Iran’s route. https://t.co/0m8HLbNfGR

tweets.text:
Here's a look at the Strait of Hormuz over the last 24 hours.

Inbound tankers were very limited with one group of tankers that got through the Oman route under US escorts.

Outside of this group, no visible AIS tankers went through the Oman route.

The other inbound tankers are all sanctioned and Iran-related. They all used the Iran route.

I have included the video from @MarineTraffic, and my table for inbound tankers is below.

thread_tweets.text:
You can call it “fear mongering” but I believe there are real, structural issues with the company that are a result of introducing risky products that have been misrepresented by Saylor and other leadership

I wouldn’t be harping on this stuff as much as I am if I didn’t truly believe it was beneficial for the industry 
 
I have put a lot of time and research into what I’ve shared and if you disagree with it that’s fine but I hope it does lead toward constructive change and help some people understand the risk in the process

tweets.text: Life is short
tweets.quoted_tweet_text:
In 2015 a writer named Tim Urban sat down and counted the days he had left with his parents. He was 34, healthy, both parents alive and well. The number came back around 300. Less time than he spent with them in any single year of his childhood.

The post is called The Tail End,

tweets.text: MSTR trading at mNAV doesn't mean everything is OK. The current market cap of $MSTR is $30B, while the current value of its Bitcoin is $50B. Until MSTR’s market cap rises above the value of its Bitcoin, any Bitcoin bought by issuing MSTR shares creates a negative Bitcoin yield.
tweets.full_text: MSTR trading at mNAV doesn't mean everything is OK. The current market cap of $MSTR is $30B, while the current value of its Bitcoin is $50B. Until MSTR’s market cap rises above the value of its Bitcoin, any Bitcoin bought by issuing MSTR shares creates a negative Bitcoin yield.

tweets.text: Jeff Gundlach warned that the U.S. Govt. may lower coupons and extend maturities on its debt to avoid default or inflation. I've warned about this for over a decade. So you go to sleep owning a 2-year T-note with a 4% coupon and wake up owning a 30-year T-bond with a 1% coupon.

tweets.text: The Republican Party was once dominated by liberal Republicans, known as Rockefeller Republicans. Conservative Republicans, known as Goldwater Republicans, were a minority until Reagan led a successful conservative revolution. @JDVance wants to return the party to the Nixon era.

thread_tweets.text: @fartface2000 @JDVance These are not the returns. They are prices that omitt every annual distribution paid. All the returns are positive.
thread_tweets.full_text: @fartface2000 @JDVance These are not the returns. They are prices that omitt every annual distribution paid. All the returns are positive.

thread_tweets.text: @fartface2000 @JDVance For example, here are the actually annual returns from Morningstar. Gold Fund: 3-year 32.5%, 5-year 13.4%, Value Fund: 3-year 15.2%, 5-year 10%. Dividend Payers Fund: 3-year 22%, 5-year 13.4%. Again these are just annual returns. The total returns are three to five times higher.

tweets.text: Reading that post a decade ago now really impacted me a lot.  Cherish your time with the people you love.
tweets.quoted_tweet_text:
In 2015 a writer named Tim Urban sat down and counted the days he had left with his parents. He was 34, healthy, both parents alive and well. The number came back around 300. Less time than he spent with them in any single year of his childhood.

The post is called The Tail End,
tweets.full_text: Reading that post a decade ago now really impacted me a lot.  Cherish your time with the people you love.

but in reality almost every goal is in the moment improvisation, the supporting runs especially from that CB obviously are planned, that was nice

the center back goes wide and drag more space and cost 1 sweden defender, that fress up more space in center for japan

the final run from daizen maeda is just being more aware and faster, it is a very nice team goal, but its improvised
